items.title: Fulu -- Fork
items.description: Describes the Fulu upgrade process. Triggered at FULU_FORK_EPOCH. Defines upgrade_to_fulu function that transitions from Electra BeaconState, adding proposer_lookahead field (EIP-7917).

items.title: Fulu -- Networking (P2P Interface)
items.description: Consensus-layer networking spec for Fulu. Defines data column sidecar subnets (128), verification helpers, gossip topics, deprecated blob_sidecar topics, DataColumnSidecarsByRange/Root req/resp, ENR structure with custody group count and next fork digest, supernode specifications.
